sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὐδείς

- Transliteration: Oudeis

- Phonetic: oo-dice'

- Definition:

1. no one, nothing

- Origin: from G3761 and G1520

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Including the feminine οὐδεμία oudemia oo-dem-ee'-ah and the neuter οὐδέν ouden oo-den' From G3761 and G1520; not even one (man woman or thing) that is none nobody nothing: - any (man) aught man neither any (thing) never (man) no (man) none (+ of these things) not (any at all -thing) nought.
